title: The Secret to Restoring Eye Health & Vision

chunks.title: Myopia and Indoor Living
chunks.summary: Discussion on the high prevalence of myopia, especially in East Asia, which correlates with increased indoor living and screen time. Suggestion to spend more time outdoors and reduce reliance on glasses is presented.

chunks.title: Age-Related Macular Degeneration
chunks.summary: Connection between blue light exposure, oxidative stress, and age-related macular degeneration is explored. The discussion also links seed oils to this condition, highlighting potential nutritional deficiencies and their impacts on eye health.

chunks.title: Mitochondrial Dysfunction and Seed Oils
chunks.summary: Explanation of how seed oils lead to mitochondrial dysfunction, potentially causing a variety of health issues including those related to visual health. The accumulation of linoleic acid in mitochondrial membranes and its effects on ATP production is discussed.
